title: oyedaea trachyphylla
intro: Oyedaea trachyphylla, also known as the 'tree lettuce', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oyedaea trachyphylla are said to include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Oyedaea trachyphylla is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine for its anti-parasitic properties.
